message:
feat(e2e): add policy guardrails E2E tests (bd-1b8k)

30 tests covering: rate limiting (per-run/hour/day), blast radius
gates, protected patterns, robot mode gates, data loss gates,
min process age, JSONL progress events, exit codes, negative
paths (malformed/missing/empty policy), and combined guardrails.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-12r5","title":"E2E: supervision gating + protected patterns","description":"## Goal
Validate supervision gates and protected-pattern enforcement end-to-end with detailed JSONL logging.

## Scope
- Run `pt agent plan` on supervision fixtures and verify gating/rerouting fields.
- Validate protected patterns prevent kill actions even with high scores.
- Negative paths: missing supervision metadata, malformed policy rules, unknown supervisor types.
- Validate exit codes and user-facing error messages are clear and actionable.

## Logging & Artifacts
- JSONL logs: event, cmd, pid, supervisor_type, blocked_reason, duration_ms, artifacts[].
- Artifacts: plan outputs + validation reports + stderr snapshots + manifest.
- Log redaction checks (no secrets/path leakage).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Supervised processes are gated or rerouted in plan output.
- [ ] Protected patterns always block kill actions.
- [ ] Failure paths produce clear errors + correct exit codes.
- [ ] JSONL logs + artifact manifests validate.

## Test Plan
- E2E script via shared harness and fixtures from bd-3gkt/bd-z3ma.

 {"id":"bd-1591","title":"No-mock capabilities + environment detection tests","description":"## Goal
Cover capabilities/environment detection with real code paths (no mocks), with E2E coverage provided in bd-3t22.

## Scope
- Unit tests for capability parsing + validation (OS/arch/paths/privileges/tools).
- Integration tests for capability manifest generation + cache read/write.
- Recorded capability fixtures from real hosts (sanitized/redacted).
- Schema validation for capability JSON outputs.

## Logging & Artifacts
- JSONL logs per fixture: event, timestamp, host_id, duration_ms, artifacts[].
- Store fixtures under `test/fixtures/capabilities/` with checksums + manifest.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Unit coverage for parsers/validators without mocks.
- [ ] Integration coverage for manifest generation + caching.
- [ ] Schema validation passes on all fixtures.
- [ ] Fixtures + logs are consumable by bd-3t22 E2E script.

## Test Plan
- Unit: parser + validator for capability structs.
- Integration: generate manifest, read back, validate schema + redaction.

 {"id":"bd-1800","title":"Guard config editor rendering for tiny areas","description":"Add bounds checks in config editor widget to avoid out-of-bounds when the render area is too small.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-24T11:06:57.118652419Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-24T11:06:57.118652419Z","closed_at":"2026-01-24T11:06:57.118652419Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
-{"id":"bd-1b8k","title":"E2E: policy guardrails (rate limit, blast radius, max kills)","description":"## Goal
Validate safety guardrails end-to-end with detailed JSONL logging.

## Scope
- Rate limiting: per-minute/hour/session counters, cooldown warnings, and hard blocks.
- Blast radius warnings: ensure high-impact actions require explicit confirmation paths.
- Max kills per session: verify guardrail enforcement in plan/apply.
- Negative paths: malformed policy.json, missing policy file, override attempts logged.
- Validate exit codes and user-facing error messages are clear and actionable.

## Logging & Artifacts
- JSONL logs: event, cmd, guardrail_type, threshold, observed, duration_ms, artifacts[].
- Artifacts: plan outputs, apply outputs (dry-run), stderr snapshots, manifest.
- Log redaction checks (no secrets/path leakage).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Guardrails are enforced in plan/apply flows.
- [ ] Warnings and blocks are surfaced clearly to users.
- [ ] Override attempts are logged with explicit user intent markers.
- [ ] Error paths produce correct exit codes and guidance.
- [ ] JSONL logs + artifact manifests validate.

## Test Plan
- E2E script using shared harness + fixtures: run `pt agent plan/apply --dry-run` against crafted inputs.

 {"id":"bd-1j14","title":"User preference learning for goal optimization","description":"Learn user risk tolerance/preferences from goal-plan decisions and adjust weighting/thresholds accordingly. Add tests for preference updates and persistence.","notes":"Implemented PreferenceModel (risk tolerance) with update_from_choice and loss adjustment; added optimize_greedy_with_preferences. Added tests for preference update and selection influence in crates/pt-core/tests/goal_optimization_tests.rs. Ran cargo test -p pt-core --test goal_optimization_tests.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-04T07:57:48.245999819Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-04T08:17:34.675361894Z","closed_at":"2026-02-04T08:17:34.675275003Z","close_reason":"Implemented preference model + tests","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1j14","depends_on_id":"process_triage-uiq","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-04T07:57:48.259037328Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1ncg","title":"Dynamic re-optimization for changing process sets","description":"Implement re-optimization when candidate set changes (process exits/appears). Include tests for plan updates and stability under churn.","notes":"Implemented reoptimize_on_change in crates/pt-core/src/decision/goal_optimizer.rs (detects candidate churn, missing selected IDs, and reoptimizes via ILP/greedy). Added tests in crates/pt-core/tests/goal_optimization_tests.rs for no-change, selected-missing, and churn-threshold behavior. Ran cargo test -p pt-core --test goal_optimization_tests.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-04T07:57:44.096079805Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-04T08:13:51.392518169Z","closed_at":"2026-02-04T08:13:51.392437198Z","close_reason":"Implemented reoptimize_on_change + tests","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1ncg","depends_on_id":"process_triage-uiq","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-04T07:57:44.107805055Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
